chapter_title.en: The Etiquette of Departing From Prayer

text: 1090 - رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِذَا اِنْصَرَفْتَ مِنَ اَلصَّلاَةِ فَانْصَرِفْ عَنْ يَمِينِكَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1090 - Muhammad ibn Muslim narrated from Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) who said:
"When you finish your prayer, turn to your right as you leave."
